headline: Assessing Pool Corp (POOL) Valuation After A Quiet Share Price Rebound
summary: What Pool (POOL) investors can take from recent performance Without a specific news event driving headlines, Pool (POOL) has quietly posted a 3.9% gain over the past day and around 8% over the past week, while the past 3 months show a 15.3% decline. See our latest analysis for Pool. Viewed over a longer window, Pool’s recent bounce contrasts with a 30 day share price return of 8.5% versus a 90 day share price return decline of 15.3% and a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 23.4%,...
